global_brief: 过去24小时的重要动态主要集中在：Anthropic shuts down Fable, Mythos models following Trump admin directive；U.S. Orders Anthropic to Suspend Fable 5 and Mythos 5 Access for Foreign Nationals；科大讯飞发布星火多模态大模型 X2-VL，当前唯一基于全国产算力训练的主流大模型。
